extremities.text: Pain in wrists and ankles; worse, slightest motion (Bry). Great restlessness and thirst. Rheumatism, needle held in fingers gets too heavy. Tingling and numbness of fingers. Pain in wrist and ankle, unable to stand

dosing.notes: Ten to fifteen drops, in about six ounces of water; teaspoonful doses every two hours

keynotes.text: color="#800000">PROPYLAMINUM Distilled Herring-brine (PROPYLAMIN - TRIMETHYLAMINUM) In acute rheumatism, dissipates fever and pain in a day or two. Rheumatic prosopalgia, and rheumatic metastases, especially heart lesions.
